basic_details.job_title: IIT BHU Professional Trainees Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Banaras Hindu University (IIT BHU)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Banaras Hindu University (IIT BHU) Professional Trainees Notification 2026 has been released on 27 April 2026 on the official website of IIT BHU. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the IIT BHU Professional Trainees Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: As per GoI norms

qualification.details: M.Com or MBA (Finance) or Graduation with Intermediate Level Certificate from Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) or Institute of Cost Accountants of India (ICWAI/ICMAI) having registered themselves for intermediate examination on or after 01.01.2019. Good working knowledge of computers, MS Office and Email communication, Tally and/or other Accounting Software.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT BHU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT BHU Professional Trainees recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the IIT BHU Professional Trainees recruitment is 19 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Professional Trainees at IIT BHU?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies announced for the Professional Trainees post at IIT BHU.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Professional Trainees post?
faq.answer: Candidates should have M.Com or MBA (Finance) or Graduation with Intermediate Level Certificate from ICAI or ICWAI/ICMAI, along with good computer skills.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Professional Trainees position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Professional Trainees post is 30 years, with age relaxation applicable as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Professional Trainees role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Professional Trainees post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the IIT BHU Professional Trainees recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 250/- for General/OBC candidates. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Professional Trainees recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Professional Trainees post involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is the application process online or offline?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT BHU Professional Trainees recruitment is strictly online.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Professional Trainees position at IIT BHU is a contractual job type.
